headlines.title_en: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
headlines.summary_cn: Alphabet（谷歌母公司）宣布计划通过股权融资筹集800亿美元，用于扩建AI基础设施和计算能力，以应对企业和消费者对AI解决方案的强劲需求。
headlines.summary_en: Alphabet announced an $80 billion equity capital raise to expand its AI infrastructure and compute capacity, responding to strong demand from enterprises and consumers.

headlines.title_en: Alphabet announces $80B equity capital raise to expand AI infra and compute
headlines.summary_cn: Alphabet正式宣布800亿美元股权融资计划，用于扩大AI基础设施和计算能力，以满足日益增长的AI需求。
headlines.summary_en: Alphabet officially announced an $80 billion equity raise to expand AI infrastructure and compute, meeting growing AI demand.

headlines.title_cn: DeepMind CEO称AI将比工业革命大10倍
headlines.title_en: DeepMind CEO: 'AI is going to be 10 times bigger than the Indust'
headlines.summary_cn: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis在访谈中称AI的影响力将比工业革命大10倍，强调其对经济和社会的变革性作用。
headlines.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis stated that AI will be 10 times bigger than the Industrial Revolution, highlighting its transformative impact on economy and society.

headlines.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over AI safety
headlines.summary_cn: 佛罗里达州总检察长正式起诉OpenAI及其CEO Sam Altman，指控其“完全漠视对人类生命的风险”，要求对AI技术的安全性负责。该诉讼标志着政府对AI监管的进一步升级。
headlines.summary_en: Florida's Attorney General has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman, alleging a 'utter disregard for the risk to human life' and demanding accountability for AI safety. This marks an escalation in government oversight of AI.
headlines.student_note: 关注AI监管动态，理解法律与科技交叉领域的重要性。

headlines.title_en: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
headlines.summary_cn: AI公司Anthropic已向美国SEC秘密提交S-1草案，筹备首次公开募股（IPO）。此举标志其正式迈向资本市场，可能成为2026年最受瞩目的科技IPO之一。
headlines.summary_en: AI company Anthropic has confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC, preparing for an IPO. This move signals its official entry into public markets, potentially one of the most anticipated tech IPOs of 2026.
headlines.student_note: 关注AI初创公司上市过程，了解S-1文件及IPO对行业的影响。

items.title_cn: hernandez42/APEX-MEM
items.title_en: hernandez42/APEX-MEM
items.summary_cn: APEX-MEM: The strongest multi-dimensional memory system for AI agents. 5D memory, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector + graph), dreaming consolidation, APEX self-healing, MCP-native. Drop-in replacement and superset of OpenClaw's memory subsystem with 100% compatibility adapters for mem0 (49.9K stars), Letta (17K stars) and LangMem.
items.summary_en: APEX-MEM: The strongest multi-dimensional memory system for AI agents. 5D memory, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector + graph), dreaming consolidation, APEX self-healing, MCP-native. Drop-in replacement and superset of OpenClaw's memory subsystem with 100% compatibility adapters for mem0 (49.9K stars), Letta (17K stars) and LangMem.

items.title_cn: GitHub与对软件的“罪行”
items.title_en: GitHub and the crime against software
items.summary_cn: 一篇批评性文章认为GitHub的某些做法（如垄断、影响开源生态）对软件行业构成了“罪行”，引发对平台责任的讨论。
items.summary_en: A critical article argues that GitHub's practices (e.g., monopolistic tendencies, impact on open source) amount to a 'crime against software', sparking debate on platform responsibility.

items.title_cn: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.title_en: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary_cn: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

items.title_cn: Anthropic提交IPO申请

items.summary_cn: AI公司Anthropic（开发Claude模型）已提交IPO申请。该公司曾被视为大语言模型领域的后来者，如今已获得顶级企业客户，成为AI巨头。
items.summary_en: Anthropic, the AI company behind Claude, has filed for an IPO. Once considered an underdog in the LLM space, it now lands top-tier enterprise customers and is a major AI player.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解AI独角兽的商业模式和上市路径。

items.summary_en: Florida has sued OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, alleging the company concealed serious risks of ChatGPT, including safety and misleading issues.

items.summary_en: The Florida AG's lawsuit also claims OpenAI's technology is dangerous and exploits users, highlighting the need for stricter regulation of AI's potential harm to consumers.

items.title_cn: Altman称对AI焦虑是合理的
items.title_en: Altman says 'people are right to be anxious' about AI

items.summary_en: This article explores why Anthropic needed Elon Musk in its journey from Claude to Colossus, possibly regarding resource access or collaboration for larger AI models.

items.title_cn: AI天气初创预测超政府机构
items.title_en: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
items.summary_cn: 天气AI初创公司WindBorne通过结合模型构建与数据收集，实现了比政府机构更准确的天气预报。该公司目前在全球15个站点发射约400个气球，实时收集传感器数据。
items.summary_en: WindBorne, an AI weather startup, outperforms government agencies in forecasting by combining model-building and data collection. It operates about 400 balloons from 15 global launch sites, gathering real-time sensor readings.

items.title_cn: 水供应成SpaceX IPO风险因素
items.title_en: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX's IPO
items.summary_cn: SpaceX在IPO文件中指出，其数据中心冷却需要大量水资源，而获取充足且廉价的水资源是一大挑战。这可能影响其AI和云计算业务的扩张。
items.summary_en: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals that significant water resources are needed to cool its data centers, and access to abundant affordable water poses a challenge. This could impact its AI and cloud computing expansion.
items.student_note: 对于关注AI基础设施环境影响的同学，这篇报道值得一看。

items.title_cn: Policy-based Foveated Imaging and Perception
items.title_en: Policy-based Foveated Imaging and Perception
items.summary_cn: Ultra-high-resolution image sensors offer the potential to capture fine spatial details critical for many visual perception tasks, but acquiring and processing all pixels at full resolution is often infeasible under realistic bandwidth, latency, and power constraints. Existing approaches address this challenge through acquisition strategies such as spatial or temporal downsampling, which irrevocably discard information before task relevance can be assessed. In this work, we introduce a real-time

items.meta: Howard Xiao, Jan Ackermann, Boyang Deng

items.title_cn: AI精神病：科技CEO的隐患？
items.title_en: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
items.summary_cn: 本期讨论科技CEO是否“特别容易患上AI精神病”——指他们对AI能力的过度乐观或不切实际的幻想。该术语描述了AI领袖在宣传时可能出现的认知偏差。
items.summary_en: The latest Equity podcast debates whether tech CEOs are 'uniquely prone to AI psychosis'—a term describing over-optimism or delusions about AI capabilities, leading to potential cognitive biases in their hype.
items.student_note: 有助于理解AI行业中的过度炒作现象，推荐听原播客。

items.title_cn: 海盗湾20年后依然坚挺
items.title_en: The Pirate Bay Remains Resilient, 20 Years After the Raid
items.summary_cn: 知名文件共享网站海盗湾在执法部门突袭20年后依然运营，展示其在数字版权冲突中的顽强生命力及去中心化网络的挑战。
items.summary_en: The Pirate Bay, the iconic file-sharing site, remains operational 20 years after a major police raid, demonstrating resilience amidst digital copyright battles and decentralized network challenges.

items.title_cn: Mitigating Perceptual Judgment Bias in Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge via Perceptual Perturbation and Reward Modeling
items.title_en: Mitigating Perceptual Judgment Bias in Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge via Perceptual Perturbation and Reward Modeling
items.summary_cn: Recent multimodal large language models have demonstrated strong reasoning ability, yet their reliability as automated evaluators remains limited by a critical weakness: when visual evidence conflicts with textual cues, MLLM judges tend to reward plausible narratives over perceptually correct answers. We identify and systematically analyze this phenomenon, which we term Perceptual Judgment Bias. Through controlled visual perturbations, existing multimodal judges frequently anchor on the response
items.summary_en: Recent multimodal large language models have demonstrated strong reasoning ability, yet their reliability as automated evaluators remains limited by a critical weakness: when visual evidence conflicts with textual cues, MLLM judges tend to reward plausible narratives over perceptually correct answers. We identify and systematically analyze this phenomenon, which we term Perceptual Judgment Bias. Through controlled visual perturbations, existing multimodal judges frequently anchor on the response
items.meta: Seojeong Park, Jiho Choi, Junyong Kang

items.title_cn: Iteris：计算数学的智能体研究循环
items.title_en: Iteris: Agentic Research Loops for Computational Mathematics
items.summary_cn: LLM和智能体系统在数学发现上取得进展，但计算数学中的开放问题关注较少。Iteris设计了一种智能体研究循环，自动探索计算数学问题、提出猜想、验证并迭代，有望加速该领域的突破。
items.summary_en: While LLMs help with math discovery, computational math open problems are less addressed. Iteris creates agentic loops that autonomously explore, conjecture, and verify in computational mathematics.
items.student_note: 适合数学与CS交叉方向学生，了解AI辅助数学研究的自动化范式。
items.meta: Leheng Chen, Zihao Liu, Wanyi He

items.title_cn: 幽灵工具调用：保护推测代理的隐私
items.title_en: Ghost Tool Calls: Issue-Time Privacy for Speculative Agent Tools
items.summary_cn: 工具增强型语言代理为了降低延迟，会推测性地提前调用未来可能需要的工具。但这些猜测调用会向外部服务泄露用户意图，即使代理后来放弃该分支。本文提出“幽灵工具调用”概念，在调用时即保护隐私，使外部服务无法辨别真实意图。
items.summary_en: Speculative tool calls in agents leak user intent to external services. Ghost Tool Calls provide issue-time privacy, making speculative calls indistinguishable from real ones to observers.
items.student_note: 关注AI隐私安全的学生可了解这一新型隐私威胁与防护思路。
items.meta: Bardia Mohammadi, Lars Klein, Akhil Arora

items.title_cn: Not All Errors Are Equal: A Systematic Study of Error Propagation in Large Language Model Inference
items.title_en: Not All Errors Are Equal: A Systematic Study of Error Propagation in Large Language Model Inference
items.summary_cn: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-performance computing (HPC) workflows, accelerating scientific discovery through diverse perspectives such as code generation and domain-specific decision-making. Yet, how soft errors propagate and affect LLM inference remains largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we present a comprehensive study on error propagation in LLM inference, enabled by our proposed LLMFI, a configurable and deterministic fault-injection framework. Usi
items.summary_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-performance computing (HPC) workflows, accelerating scientific discovery through diverse perspectives such as code generation and domain-specific decision-making. Yet, how soft errors propagate and affect LLM inference remains largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we present a comprehensive study on error propagation in LLM inference, enabled by our proposed LLMFI, a configurable and deterministic fault-injection framework. Usi
items.meta: Yafan Huang, Sheng Di, Guanpeng Li

items.title_cn: LongLive-RAG: A General Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Long Video Generation
items.title_en: LongLive-RAG: A General Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Long Video Generation
items.summary_cn: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion enables variable-length synthesis, but long-horizon generation often suffers from accumulated errors and identity drift. For efficiency, existing methods commonly adopt sliding-window attention during generation. This creates an irreversible generation trajectory: once the active window accumulates appearance errors, subsequent generations can only condition on this degraded trajectory and drift further away. We address this limitation by formulating long vide
items.summary_en: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion enables variable-length synthesis, but long-horizon generation often suffers from accumulated errors and identity drift. For efficiency, existing methods commonly adopt sliding-window attention during generation. This creates an irreversible generation trajectory: once the active window accumulates appearance errors, subsequent generations can only condition on this degraded trajectory and drift further away. We address this limitation by formulating long vide
items.meta: Qixin Hu, Shuai Yang, Wei Huang

items.title_cn: AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs
items.title_en: AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs
items.summary_cn: Video is temporally redundant: adjacent frames usually share most objects, background, and layout. Yet existing video multimodal large language models (video MLLMs) usually encode each sampled frame as an independent RGB image, causing visual tokens to repeat content already present in earlier frames. This suggests a more direct video interface: send a full reference frame only when the scene cannot be predicted well from prior context, and otherwise transmit a compact description of inter-frame
items.summary_en: Video is temporally redundant: adjacent frames usually share most objects, background, and layout. Yet existing video multimodal large language models (video MLLMs) usually encode each sampled frame as an independent RGB image, causing visual tokens to repeat content already present in earlier frames. This suggests a more direct video interface: send a full reference frame only when the scene cannot be predicted well from prior context, and otherwise transmit a compact description of inter-frame
items.meta: Haowen Hou, Zhen Huang, Zheming Liang

items.title_cn: ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents
items.title_en: ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents
items.summary_cn: Clinical practice is not the selection of an answer from enumerated options: a physician gathers heterogeneous information incrementally and commits to sequential, irreversible decisions under uncertainty. Static benchmarks cannot probe and existing interactive medical benchmarks each compromise on at least one of them. We present ClinEnv, an interactive benchmark that evaluates LLMs as attending physicians over real inpatient admissions under a paradigm we term Longitudinal Inpatient Simulation
items.summary_en: Clinical practice is not the selection of an answer from enumerated options: a physician gathers heterogeneous information incrementally and commits to sequential, irreversible decisions under uncertainty. Static benchmarks cannot probe and existing interactive medical benchmarks each compromise on at least one of them. We present ClinEnv, an interactive benchmark that evaluates LLMs as attending physicians over real inpatient admissions under a paradigm we term Longitudinal Inpatient Simulation
items.meta: Yuxing Lu, Yushuhong Lin, Wenqi Shi

items.title_cn: Permissive Safety Through Trusted Inference: Verifiable Belief-Space Neural Safety Filters for Assured Interactive Robotics
items.title_en: Permissive Safety Through Trusted Inference: Verifiable Belief-Space Neural Safety Filters for Assured Interactive Robotics
items.summary_cn: Autonomous robots that interact with people must make safe and efficient decisions under human-induced uncertainty, such as their preferences, goals, competency, and willingness to cooperate. Safety filters are a popular approach for ensuring safety in interactive robotics, since their modular design separates safety from performance, allowing robots to operate safely around people with minimal impact on task efficiency. While traditional safety filters typically operate only in the physical spa
items.summary_en: Autonomous robots that interact with people must make safe and efficient decisions under human-induced uncertainty, such as their preferences, goals, competency, and willingness to cooperate. Safety filters are a popular approach for ensuring safety in interactive robotics, since their modular design separates safety from performance, allowing robots to operate safely around people with minimal impact on task efficiency. While traditional safety filters typically operate only in the physical spa

items.title_cn: LLM压缩：从层到子模块的粒度革命
items.title_en: From Layers to Submodules: Rethinking Granularity in Replacement-Based LLM Compression
items.summary_cn: 传统LLM压缩方法以完整层为单位进行替换或删除，但这种方式限制了灵活性。该研究提出将压缩粒度细化到子模块级别，通过非连续选择实现更精准的模型瘦身，有望在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。
items.summary_en: Existing LLM compression methods operate at full-layer granularity with contiguous selection. This work argues for finer granularity by replacing or deleting submodules, enabling more flexible and efficient compression.
items.student_note: 推荐学习：理解子模块压缩思路，有助于掌握模型轻量化前沿。
items.meta: Elia Cunegatti, Marcus Vukojevic, Erik Nielsen

items.title_cn: SafeSteer：高效安全对齐的局部位策略蒸馏
items.title_en: SafeSteer: Localized On-Policy Distillation for Efficient Safety Alignment
items.summary_cn: LLM安全对齐通常会导致通用能力下降（对齐税）。SafeSteer提出局部位策略蒸馏，仅在需要安全的局部区域进行对齐训练，避免全局数据依赖和辅助奖励模型，在保持安全性的同时显著减少能力损失。
items.summary_en: Safety alignment in LLMs often degrades general capabilities (alignment tax). SafeSteer uses localized on-policy distillation to align only safety-critical regions, reducing tax without needing massive data or reward models.
items.student_note: 推荐AI安全方向学生关注，了解如何缓解对齐税问题。
items.meta: Hao Li, Jingkun An, Zijun Song

items.title_cn: RASER：多跳问答的高效路由策略
items.title_en: RASER: Recoverability-Aware Selective Escalation Router for Multi-Hop Question Answering
items.summary_cn: 多跳问答系统通常对每个问题都进行昂贵检索（如多次LLM调用）。RASER提出可恢复性感知的选择升级路由：先尝试简单直接回答，如果判断无法恢复正确结果，再升级到多跳策略，从而节省大量计算资源。
items.summary_en: Multi-hop QA often uses expensive retrieval on every question. RASER first attempts direct answering and only escalates to multi-hop when recoverability is low, reducing cost significantly.
items.meta: Yuyang Li, Zihe Yan, Tobias Käfer

items.title_cn: MCP-Persona：真实个人应用中的LLM代理基准
items.title_en: MCP-Persona: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Real-World Personal Applications via Environment Simulation
items.summary_cn: 模型上下文协议（MCP）已成为LLM连接外部工具的标准，现有基准多聚焦通用场景。MCP-Persona通过模拟真实个人应用环境（如邮件、日历、文件管理），评估代理在具体个人任务上的表现，填补了实际应用测试的空白。
items.summary_en: MCP enables LLMs to use external tools, but benchmarks lack real personal apps. MCP-Persona simulates environments like email and calendar to evaluate agents on practical personal tasks.
items.student_note: 适合做Agent应用开发的学生，了解基于MCP的实用评估方法。
items.meta: Wenhao Wang, Peizhi Niu, Gongyi Zou

items.title_cn: 多语言推理中的翻译时机学习
items.title_en: Learning When to Translate for Multilingual Reasoning
items.summary_cn: 推理语言模型在多语言推理上存在差距，主要源于非英语输入的理解问题。机器翻译可缓解，但盲目翻译所有输入成本高且可能损失语义。本文提出一个学习何时翻译的决策模型，根据语言和问题复杂度动态选择翻译策略，提升推理准确率。
items.summary_en: Multilingual reasoning gaps stem from understanding failures in non-English inputs. This work learns when to translate inputs, balancing cost and accuracy, improving reasoning performance across languages.
items.student_note: 多语言NLP方向的同学可关注，了解翻译与推理的动态权衡。
items.meta: Deokhyung Kang, Hyounghun Kim, Gary Geunbae Lee

items.title_cn: MASER：具身3D空间智能的模态自适应路由
items.title_en: MASER: Modality-Adaptive Specialist Routing for Embodied 3D Spatial Intelligence
items.summary_cn: 在3D环境中，具身代理需要综合自然语言、RGB图像、点云、深度图和相机位姿等多模态信息回答空间问题。现有视觉语言模型通常针对单一模态微调。MASER提出模态自适应专家路由，为不同模态选择专门专家模型，协同推理提升空间问答准确率。
items.summary_en: Embodied agents need multiple modalities for 3D spatial QA. MASER routes queries to modality-specific experts, enabling adaptive fusion and outperforming single-modality fine-tuned models.
items.student_note: 适合具身AI或3D视觉方向学生，了解多模态融合新思路。

items.title_cn: PaSBench-Video: A Streaming Video Benchmark for Proactive Safety Warning
items.title_en: PaSBench-Video: A Streaming Video Benchmark for Proactive Safety Warning
items.summary_cn: Between the first visible sign of danger and the moment an accident occurs, there is often a window where intervention remains possible. Video-capable multimodal large language models (MLLMs) could serve as always-on safety monitors that issue warnings during this window. Yet current benchmarks do not test this ability: they rely on static inputs, ignore timing precision, and omit false-positive measurement on safe scenes. We present PaSBench-Video, a 740-video benchmark with 481 risk and 259 no
items.summary_en: Between the first visible sign of danger and the moment an accident occurs, there is often a window where intervention remains possible. We present PaSBench-Video, a 740-video benchmark with 481 risk and 259 no
items.meta: Yusong Zhao, Yuejin Xie, Youliang Yuan
